title: MAIDAPACK
description: The MAIDAPACK is a modpack made for all those people who are looking for better performance, aesthetics in their game, mechanics that will make your life easier and more.
body:
![Maidapack título](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3d61a744bc151bb8850fbc5a6f8f594c721d0b3.png)

# Our objetive
With the Maidapack, I want people to be able to play Minecraft in a welcoming environment that is optimized for their needs, changing things to make the game go faster and more beautiful, and adding mods that make your game simpler and faster. and effective, shortening tedious tasks that are unnecessarily long.

Thanks for downloading.
